title: SlotID Tooltip
description: A simple client-side Fabric mod that displays the slot ID in tooltips when hovering over inventory slots.
body:
SlotID Tooltip

A simple client-side Fabric mod that displays the slot ID in tooltips when hovering over inventory slots.

## Usage Simply hover over any inventory slot (empty or containing an item) to see its slot ID displayed in the tooltip. This is particularly useful in servers with custom GUI textures where its difficult to indentify individual slots. Also works in the Creative mode inventory menu.
